response.processed:
TaskList: gap $md-gap, pad $md-pad, bg $surface-bg

TaskItem: ver-center, spread, pad $sm-pad, bg $elevated-bg, rad $sm-rad
  hover
    bg $hover-bg

TaskList
  each $task in $tasks
    TaskItem
      Row ver-center, gap $sm-gap
        Checkbox
          onclick: change $task
        Text col $task-completed ? $muted-col : $default-col
          Text $task.title
      Button
        onclick: delete $task
        Icon named trash
